坐车.zh: 从这里坐车，要花两个小时才能到我叔叔家。
坐车.en: By car, it takes 2 hours to get to my uncle's house.

音信.zh: 从那以后，我再也没有他的音信了。
音信.en: I haven't gotten any messages from him since then.

中游.zh: 汤姆是我认识的人当中游泳最快的。
中游.en: Tom can swim faster than anyone else I know.

双语.zh: 在当今的世界，拥有双语种是必要的
双语.en: Being at least bilingual is a must in today's world.

双语.zh: 严肃的讲在这里只有我一个人不会双语的吗？
双语.en: Am I seriously the only one who isn't bilingual here?

语种.zh: 在当今的世界，拥有双语种是必要的
语种.en: Being at least bilingual is a must in today's world.

挫.zh: 一个人得遇到多大的挫折才会自杀？
挫.en: How frustrated must a person be to commit suicide?

挫.zh: 他克服了種種困難和挫折，終於成功一個人越過了南極洲。
挫.en: He overcame all sorts of hardship and setbacks to succeed in a solo crossing of Antarctica.

挫折.zh: 一个人得遇到多大的挫折才会自杀？
挫折.en: How frustrated must a person be to commit suicide?

挫折.zh: 他克服了種種困難和挫折，終於成功一個人越過了南極洲。
挫折.en: He overcame all sorts of hardship and setbacks to succeed in a solo crossing of Antarctica.

仍旧.en: I still can't believe I did it.

里约.zh: 里约热内卢的一条自行车道倒塌了。
里约.en: A bike path collapsed in Rio.

里约.zh: 里约热内卢的一条海边的高架自行车道倒塌了。
里约.en: An elevated seaside bike path collapsed in Rio.

里约.zh: 我的祖父母来自里斯本，但是我的父母来自里约热内卢。
里约.en: My grandparents are from Lisbon, but my parents are from Rio de Janeiro.

皮子.zh: 这场事故发生在我们的眼皮子底下。
皮子.en: The accident happened right before our eyes.

眼皮子.zh: 这场事故发生在我们的眼皮子底下。
眼皮子.en: The accident happened right before our eyes.

烟灰.zh: 亲吻一个抽烟的人就像在舔烟灰缸。
烟灰.en: Kissing a person who smokes is like licking an ashtray.

烟灰缸.zh: 亲吻一个抽烟的人就像在舔烟灰缸。
烟灰缸.en: Kissing a person who smokes is like licking an ashtray.

皙.zh: 我所爱的是白皙红润，千里挑一的。
皙.en: My beloved is white and ruddy, chosen out of thousands.

白皙.en: My beloved is white and ruddy, chosen out of thousands.

红润.en: My beloved is white and ruddy, chosen out of thousands.

罚款.en: They fine you in Singapore if you throw trash in the streets.

提名.zh: 他们提名卡尔文•柯立芝为副总统。
提名.en: They nominated Calvin Coolidge for vice president.

卡尔.en: They nominated Calvin Coolidge for vice president.

卡尔.en: Karl Marx said: "Workers of the world, unite!"

卡尔文.en: They nominated Calvin Coolidge for vice president.

柯.en: They nominated Calvin Coolidge for vice president.

呃.en: Well, Bill, I am pleased to see you here.

埃博拉.en: Ebola spreads from person to person through bodily fluids.

不正确.en: People shouldn't be allowed to invade countries whose names they can't pronounce correctly.

名誉.en: Even with all his wealth and fame, he's unhappy.

长途电话.en: Good. Can you make long distance calls from the room?

模样.en: Look at him. He looks like an idiot but he's also very cute.

跨国.zh: 跨国公司预料到了规模经济的实行。

歌声.zh: 你的歌声像太平洋的海水一样清澈。

歌声.en: In the evening quiet, we enjoy the song of the euphonious nightingale.

声像.zh: 你的歌声像太平洋的海水一样清澈。
声像.en: You sing with a voice as clear as the waters of the Pacific Ocean.

变暗.en: It's getting dark. I wonder if it's going to rain.

豪宅.en: Compared to our house, yours is a mansion.

若是.en: They'd have been killed if the car had gone over the cliff.

若是.en: When you hurt others, you also hurt yourself.

碳水.zh: 你对复合碳水化合物有什么了解吗？
碳水.en: Do you know anything about complex carbohydrates?

水化.zh: 你对复合碳水化合物有什么了解吗？
水化.en: Do you know anything about complex carbohydrates?

迭.en: Keiko deftly piles up the dishes and takes them to the sink.

迭起.zh: 惠子巧妙地把碗碟迭起再拿到水槽。
迭起.en: Keiko deftly piles up the dishes and takes them to the sink.

水槽.en: Keiko deftly piles up the dishes and takes them to the sink.

水槽.en: Ziri needs baking soda to clean his kitchen sink.

供奉.en: Do you know which deity this temple is dedicated to?

原物料.zh: 他們壟斷了原物料供應，並開天價。

语流.en: He speaks English so fluently that he resembles an American.

利得.en: He speaks English so fluently that he resembles an American.

利得.en: I was amazed at the fluency with which the boy spoke French.

大教堂.en: I met her at 8:30p.m at the cathedral.

蓉.zh: 蓉蓉的妈妈一点都不像一个好妈妈。
蓉.en: Rong Rong's mother doesn't seem to be a good mother.

遗失.en: A reward will be paid to anyone who brings back the money that he lost.

地步.en: I'm not rich enough to buy cheap stuff.

好睡.en: After sleeping well, I felt much better.

自语.en: "What shall I do?" I said to myself.

自语.en: My grandfather sometimes talks to himself when he's alone.

自言自语.zh: “我该做什么呢？”我自言自语道。
自言自语.en: "What shall I do?" I said to myself.

自言自语.zh: 我祖父一个人的时候，有时会自言自语。
自言自语.en: My grandfather sometimes talks to himself when he's alone.

蟹.zh: 第一个吃螃蟹的人一定也吃过蜘蛛。

螃蟹.zh: 第一个吃螃蟹的人一定也吃过蜘蛛。
螃蟹.en: The first person who ate crab must also have tried to eat a spider.

新郎.en: Please charge your glasses and drink a toast to the bride and groom!

兼职.en: You can make up to 80,000 yen a month in that part-time job.

全职.zh: 她以前是兼职厨师，后来做了全职。

强国.en: Will Algeria become an energy power?

碎裂.zh: 仔細檢查後發現，該頭骨被重擊碎裂。
碎裂.en: After careful examination, it can be seen that the skull was smashed to pieces.

碎裂.en: Another step forward revealed that the skull had received violent impact and disintegrated.

直截.zh: 她从不要求他直截了当地给出答复。
直截.en: She never expects a straight answer from him.

直截.zh: 玛丽直截了当地拒绝了汤姆的请求。
能够直截了当地表达自己想法的人很直爽。
直截.en: People who can express their thoughts in a clear-cut way are very straightforward.

直截了当.zh: 她从不要求他直截了当地给出答复。
直截了当.en: She never expects a straight answer from him.

直截了当.zh: 玛丽直截了当地拒绝了汤姆的请求。

本我.en: The other day I discovered a book written by my father.

土著.zh: 澳大利亚土著已经吃了上千年袋鼠。
土著.en: Indigenous Australians have eaten kangaroos for millennia.

土著.zh: 帕查瑪瑪是安地斯山脈土著居民敬仰的大地和生育女神。
土著.en: Pachamama is a goddess of earth and fertility revered by the indigenous peoples of the Andes.

袋鼠.zh: 澳大利亚土著已经吃了上千年袋鼠。
袋鼠.en: Indigenous Australians have eaten kangaroos for millennia.

多邻国.en: Yesterday I finished learning Esperanto on Duolingo.

化学物.zh: 这个垃圾袋不含任何有害化学物质。
化学物.en: This trash bag does not contain any dangerous chemicals.

二分.zh: 这个公司二分之三的雇员是工程师。
二分.en: Two thirds of the employees of this company are engineers.

雇员.en: Two thirds of the employees of this company are engineers.

芬兰语.zh: 汤姆说了为他最难的语言是芬兰语。
芬兰语.en: Tom said that the most difficult language for him had been Finnish.

接口.zh: 不想做是原因；不能做仅仅是接口。
接口.en: Not wanting to is the reason; not being able to is just an excuse.

豪华.en: On the seventh floor, you can find four luxury restaurants.

教材.en: Will it be necessary for us to buy a book for this class?

理清.en: Tom and Mary are still figuring it out.

情趣.en: There must sometimes be some fun between two people.

情趣.en: Taobao suggested sexy and cute erotic underwear for me.

去除.en: Please take off all your clothes except your underpants and bra.

秦.zh: 最早的琵琶大约在秦朝时期发明的。

秦朝.zh: 最早的琵琶大约在秦朝时期发明的。
秦朝.en: The first lute was invented during the Qin dynasty.

正事.en: Anyway the event has already passed, there is no point in mentioning it again.

三文治.en: Tom said he saw Mary eating a sandwich in the park.

鲤.zh: 鱼类例如鲤鱼和鳟鱼生活在淡水中。
鲤.en: Fish such as carp and trout live in fresh water.

鳟.en: Fish such as carp and trout live in fresh water.

鲤鱼.en: Fish such as carp and trout live in fresh water.

鳟鱼.en: Fish such as carp and trout live in fresh water.

鱼生.zh: 鱼类例如鲤鱼和鳟鱼生活在淡水中。
鱼生.en: Fish such as carp and trout live in fresh water.

着重.zh: 电视在日常生活中起着重要的作用。
着重.en: TV plays an important part in everyday life.

着重.zh: 大自然在我们的生活中扮演着重要的角色。
着重.en: Nature plays an important role in our life.

着重.zh: 无论我们是否喜欢电脑，它在我们的生活中始终起着重要的作用。
着重.en: Computers are certainly playing an important role in our life, whether we like it or not.

辘.en: I don't know about you, but I'm starving.

辘.zh: 汤姆你能给那些饥肠辘辘的人们一些吃的吗?
辘.en: Tom, would you please give these starving people something to eat?

辘.zh: 我们应该尽量的提供一些食物给那些饥肠辘辘的人们.

失言.zh: 一時失言常常會帶來意想不到的結果。
失言.en: A slip of the tongue often brings about unexpected results.

意想不到.zh: 一時失言常常會帶來意想不到的結果。
意想不到.en: A slip of the tongue often brings about unexpected results.

意想不到.zh: 一點點的運氣有時會導致意想不到的成功。
意想不到.en: A little bit of luck sometimes leads to an unexpected success.

心如刀割.zh: 她得知父親突然離世，不禁心如刀割。
心如刀割.en: She was filled with deep grief to hear of her father's sudden death.

小聪明.zh: 即使他有些小聪明，但是他并不智慧。
小聪明.en: Though he is clever, he isn't wise.

不智.zh: 即使他有些小聪明，但是他并不智慧。
不智.en: Though he is clever, he isn't wise.

神不守舍.en: I think that Delbert is crazy.

狗日.en: The dog waited day after day for its master's return.

停水.zh: 聽說不交水費就會被停水，是真的嗎？
停水.en: I've heard that if you default on the water rates your water supply will be suspended, is that true?

饭馆儿.zh: 大家说这家饭馆儿的菜又好吃又便宜。
饭馆儿.en: Everyone says the food in this restaurant is both delicious and inexpensive.

饭馆儿.zh: 那家饭馆儿的服务员给我们留下很好的印象。
饭馆儿.en: The staff in that restaurant gave us a very good impression.

地和.zh: 资本、土地和劳动是生产的三大要素。
地和.en: Capital, land and labor are the three key factors of production.

地和.zh: 帕查瑪瑪是安地斯山脈土著居民敬仰的大地和生育女神。

大要.zh: 资本、土地和劳动是生产的三大要素。
大要.en: Capital, land and labor are the three key factors of production.

鬼叫.zh: 風聲有點恐怖，聽起來好像鬼叫一般。
鬼叫.en: The wind sounds scary, like screaming ghosts.

直率.en: Showing your real feelings is not considered a virtue in Japan.

人间天堂.en: A plate of pilaf with some kebabs is heaven on earth.

汇款.en: I'm sorry, without an I.D. you cannot receive a remittance.

齐心.zh: 本地人、外来人齐心共创上海新文明。
齐心.en: Native Chinese people are working alongside foreigners to change the culture of Shanghai.

外来人.zh: 本地人、外来人齐心共创上海新文明。
外来人.en: Native Chinese people are working alongside foreigners to change the culture of Shanghai.

刘备.zh: 刘备和诸葛亮是一支无法战胜的队伍。
刘备.en: Liu Bei and Zhuge Liang are an unbeatable team.

诸葛.en: Liu Bei and Zhuge Liang are an unbeatable team.

诸葛.zh: 但是，当然啦，事后诸葛亮总是好当。

诸葛亮.zh: 刘备和诸葛亮是一支无法战胜的队伍。
诸葛亮.en: Liu Bei and Zhuge Liang are an unbeatable team.

诸葛亮.zh: 但是，当然啦，事后诸葛亮总是好当。

津津.zh: 那場演講很長，但我卻聽得津津有味。

设置.en: I need to configure this server with an appropriate firewall system.

设置.en: Most developers hate debugging; it's more fun to create bugs than to correct them.

防火.zh: 我该在这个服务器上设置一个防火墙。
防火.en: I need to configure this server with an appropriate firewall system.

武功.zh: 他的武功已经达到了出神入化的境界。
武功.en: His martial arts prowess has already reached a level of sublime perfection.

出神.zh: 他的武功已经达到了出神入化的境界。
出神.en: His martial arts prowess has already reached a level of sublime perfection.

出神.en: If God doesn't exist in our world, then I will create God with my own hands.

神入.en: His martial arts prowess has already reached a level of sublime perfection.

有方.en: She gets lost really easily. She's got no sense of direction.

桥段.zh: 在他的文章中总是有太多肤浅的桥段。
桥段.en: There was always too much superfluous writing in his essays.

百度.zh: 我們的老師說水到了一百度就會沸騰。
百度.en: Our teacher said that water boils at 100°C.

逢.zh: 我父親每逢星期天都會去打高爾夫球。
逢.en: My father plays golf every Sunday.

逢.zh: 你所要做的便是好好把握這千載難逢的機會。
逢.en: All you have to do is take advantage of this rare opportunity.

每逢.zh: 我父親每逢星期天都會去打高爾夫球。
每逢.en: My father plays golf every Sunday.

视同.zh: 老师应该一视同仁地对待他们的学生。
视同.en: Teachers should treat all their students impartially.

同仁.zh: 老师应该一视同仁地对待他们的学生。
同仁.en: Teachers should treat all their students impartially.

一视同仁.zh: 老师应该一视同仁地对待他们的学生。

疹.zh: 愛情就像麻疹──一生總要經歷一次。

麻疹.zh: 愛情就像麻疹──一生總要經歷一次。
麻疹.en: Love is like the measles; we all have to go through it.

近况.en: I'm just wondering how you are getting on and if you have adjusted to the new environment.

遇溺.en: He saved the drowning boy at the risk of his own life.

遇溺.en: He saved the boy from drowning, but only at the cost of his own life.

明代.zh: 明代十五世纪初紫禁城是北京的中心。

五世.zh: 明代十五世纪初紫禁城是北京的中心。
五世.en: In the Ming Dynasty (early 15th century) the centre of Beijing was the Forbidden City.

团聚.zh: 说明年夜饭的饺子是亲人团聚的象征。
团聚.en: This means that eating dumplings on New Year's eve is a symbol of family reunion.

团聚.en: On Mid-Autumn Day, families gather, eat moon cake together, and watch the moon.

恐怖分子.en: One man's terrorist is another man's freedom fighter.

冈.zh: 有一个人住在福冈，其他人住在新泻。

福冈.zh: 有一个人住在福冈，其他人住在新泻。
福冈.en: One lives in Fukuoka, and the others live in Niigata.

首屈一指.en: Yamada is second to none in English in his class.

裔.en: Some believe that the British Royal Family is directly descended from the line of King David.

一小部分.en: Our world is only a small part of the universe.

直呼.en: Most Americans do not object to my calling them by their first names.

直呼其名.en: Most Americans do not object to my calling them by their first names.

忑.zh: 虽然有人来了，但是她还是忐忑不安。

优化.en: If human life is convex, we can optimize it.

优化.en: We have optimized the database indexing, and as a result, system efficiency has improved by 50%.

美人鱼.zh: 你的嗓音对我来说就像是美人鱼的歌。

接住.en: I'm grateful to him for catching my hat that I lost on the windy street.

遗传.en: Through genetic modification, we can improve crops.

遗传.en: Is it true that our genetic heritage is almost the same as that of chimpanzees?

修饰.en: Through genetic modification, we can improve crops.

凑份子.en: We all chipped in to buy our teacher a birthday present.

下发.zh: 我完全是在偶然的情况下发现了密室。
下发.en: I found the secret compartment quite by accident.

密室.zh: 我完全是在偶然的情况下发现了密室。
密室.en: I found the secret compartment quite by accident.

密室.en: In the most secret chamber of the castle lay the greatest treasure on earth—the Book of Truth.

弈.zh: 在大博弈期間，阿富汗是一個緩衝國。
弈.en: During the Great Game, Afghanistan was a buffer state.

登陆.zh: 可能我的孙子会是登陆火星的第一人。
登陆.en: Maybe my grandchild will be the first person to set foot on Mars.

透气.zh: 我想尽快从这个不透气的屋子里出去。
透气.en: I want to move out of this cramped room as soon as I can.

不透气.zh: 我想尽快从这个不透气的屋子里出去。
不透气.en: I want to move out of this cramped room as soon as I can.

犯罪行为.en: That is a criminal offense, and you will surely be punished!

犯罪行为.en: His son's criminal activities caused him great pain.

冲绳.en: The minimum wage in Okinawa is 642 yen per hour.

出口商.zh: 去年的進口商品額超過了出口商品額。

出口商品.zh: 去年的進口商品額超過了出口商品額。

祸首.zh: 听起来好像他是这场灾难的罪魁祸首。
祸首.en: It sounds as if he were to blame for the disaster.

优厚.en: They hope to be able to find a well-paid job.

拆除.zh: 他們將在兩天內拆除這棟舊的建築物。
拆除.en: They will tear down the old building in two days.

拆除.zh: 没有人会为这个旧建筑物的拆除而落泪。
拆除.en: Nobody's going to shed any tears if that old building gets torn down.

拆除.zh: 這棟老房子被拆除了，以騰出空間給超級市場。
拆除.en: The old houses were torn down to make room for a supermarket.

有活力.zh: 不知道為什麼我夜裡覺得比較有活力。
有活力.en: For some reason I feel more alive at night.

青森.en: This truck transports fresh food from Aomori to Tokyo.

称钱.zh: 声称钱不是幸福的一个要素是愚蠢的。
称钱.en: Claiming that money is not a requirement for happiness is foolish.

同期.en: Exports in January were up 20% over the same period of last year.

同期.en: When one of my coworkers starts racking up good sales figures I can't let down my guard.

自毁.zh: 如果你辞掉这份工作，你将在自毁后路
自毁.en: If you quit the job, you'll be burning your bridges.

联邦.zh: 德意志联邦共和国建立于1949年。
联邦.en: The Federal Republic of Germany was established in 1949.

德意志.zh: 德意志联邦共和国建立于1949年。
德意志.en: The Federal Republic of Germany was established in 1949.

蔚.en: Wearing second-hand clothes is now popular among young people.

鹤.zh: 教我怎么折纸鹤吧。我忘记怎么折了。
鹤.en: Teach me how to fold a paper crane. I forgot how to fold it.

鹤.zh: 今祯子当时能做的就是折纸鹤并期盼奇迹。
鹤.en: All Sadako could do now was to make paper cranes and hope for a miracle.

纸鹤.zh: 教我怎么折纸鹤吧。我忘记怎么折了。
纸鹤.en: Teach me how to fold a paper crane. I forgot how to fold it.

纸鹤.en: All Sadako could do now was to make paper cranes and hope for a miracle.

趣味.en: The job is interesting, and then again, the pay is good.

主唱.en: It'll be hard to find a good vocalist who isn't already working with another band.

课题.en: I'm an anthropology research student, and my topic is 'Chinese medicine in Britain'.

历史事件.zh: 公元前七千年那段时间发生了很多重要的历史事件。
历史事件.en: Many important historical events took place 7000 years B.C.

上市公司.zh: 汤姆名义上市公司的领导。他儿子做所有重大决策。
上市公司.en: Tom is the head of the company in name only. His son makes all the important decisions.

去往.zh: 他在一周前离开去往欧洲，就是说，是在五月十号。
去往.en: He left for Europe a week ago, that is, on the tenth of May.

就是说.zh: 他在一周前离开去往欧洲，就是说，是在五月十号。
就是说.en: He left for Europe a week ago, that is, on the tenth of May.

即将来临.zh: Tom没有意图去邀请Mary去即将来临的舞会。
即将来临.en: Tom has no intention of asking Mary to the upcoming dance.

棕榈油.zh: 棕榈油制造是导致印度尼西亚森林砍伐的主要原因。
棕榈油.en: Palm oil production is the leading cause of deforestation in Indonesia.

家电.zh: 广场东边有一家电影院，从这儿到大概要走十分钟。
家电.en: There's a movie theatre on the east side of the plaza, about ten minutes walk from here.

武力.zh: 靠武力取勝，猶如落敗，因為這樣的勝利不會長久。
武力.en: Victory attained by violence is tantamount to a defeat, for it is momentary.

音乐剧.zh: 他好像对音乐剧什么的很感兴趣，而且还非常内行。
音乐剧.en: He seems very interested in musical theatre and the like, and he also seems quite adept.

热水瓶.zh: 当然，那些热水瓶是不是他们自己的就不得而知了。
热水瓶.en: Obviously, we don't know if those thermos flasks are their own.

医术.zh: 那个时代，医生的命运掌握在不懂医术的人的手里。
医术.en: During that era, the fate of doctors was in the hands of people who did not understand medicine.

阴谋.zh: 我的朋友相信阴谋论，我该试着向他指出他错了吗？
阴谋.en: My friend believes conspiracy theories; should I try to prove him wrong?

阴谋论.zh: 我的朋友相信阴谋论，我该试着向他指出他错了吗？
阴谋论.en: My friend believes conspiracy theories; should I try to prove him wrong?

指数.zh: 嗨，先生，黑板上的不是指数函数，而是三角函数。
指数.en: Hey, sir, the function on the blackboard is not exponential, but trigonometric.

指数函数.zh: 嗨，先生，黑板上的不是指数函数，而是三角函数。
指数函数.en: Hey, sir, the function on the blackboard is not exponential, but trigonometric.

三角函数.zh: 嗨，先生，黑板上的不是指数函数，而是三角函数。
三角函数.en: Hey, sir, the function on the blackboard is not exponential, but trigonometric.

大限.zh: 对于我们来说，这已经是做出了最大限度的让步了。
大限.en: In our view, we have already made the biggest possible compromise.

觉醒.zh: 中国是一只沉睡的狮子，一旦觉醒，将会震惊世界。
觉醒.en: China is a sleeping tiger, but once it wakes up, it will shock the world.

腥.zh: 因为他认为美剧镜头很血腥，所以他不喜欢看美剧。
腥.en: Because American dramas are very bloody, he doesn't like watching them.

镜头.zh: 因为他认为美剧镜头很血腥，所以他不喜欢看美剧。
镜头.en: Because American dramas are very bloody, he doesn't like watching them.

血腥.zh: 因为他认为美剧镜头很血腥，所以他不喜欢看美剧。
血腥.en: Because American dramas are very bloody, he doesn't like watching them.

馆子.zh: 那家馆子物美价廉，美中不足的是他们糟糕的位置。
馆子.en: That place's food is delicious and their prices are low. However, their location isn't good.

繁华.zh: 阿尔及尔是一座有着超过三百多万人口的繁华都市。
繁华.en: Algiers is a bustling city of over three million people.

对得起.zh: 他想，如果不好好学习，怎么对得起祖国的人民呢？
对得起.en: He thought, If I don't study hard, how can I be worthy of my countrymen?

保龄球.zh: 虽然我享受打保龄球，但是我最近没有去打保龄球。
保龄球.en: Although I enjoy bowling, I haven't gone bowling recently.

够用.zh: 他总觉得时间不够用，却不知道时间都用在了哪里。
够用.en: He always feels he doesn't have enough time, but he doesn't have any idea where his time goes.

菜刀.zh: 这把菜刀不够锋利，所以我用了我的折叠刀来切肉。
菜刀.en: The kitchen knife wasn't sharp enough to cut the meat, so I used my pocket knife.

折叠刀.zh: 这把菜刀不够锋利，所以我用了我的折叠刀来切肉。
折叠刀.en: The kitchen knife wasn't sharp enough to cut the meat, so I used my pocket knife.

弟妹.zh: “但是我们是弟妹，对吗？” “仅仅在名义上。“
弟妹.en: "But we're brother and sisters, aren't we?!" "In name we are."

嘻嘻.zh: 对不起-啊。我昨晚不能睡觉，且我睡过头。嘻嘻！
嘻嘻.en: Sorrrry. I couldn't sleep last night, and so I overslept. Teehee!

融冰.zh: 隨著全球氣溫變暖，南極大陸的融冰量也日益增加。
融冰.en: With global warming, the amount of ice melting in Antarctica is increasing.

日益增加.zh: 隨著全球氣溫變暖，南極大陸的融冰量也日益增加。
日益增加.en: With global warming, the amount of ice melting in Antarctica is increasing.

成就感.zh: 我喜欢这个工作因为它立竿见影，让人很有成就感。
成就感.en: I like this work because you see the result immediately; it's very rewarding.

结合.zh: 我们可能会将你的私人信息和其他信息结合在一起。
结合.en: We may combine your personal information with other information.

垂死.zh: 有着火的汽车和垂死的人，而且没有人能帮得上忙。
垂死.en: There were cars burning, people dying, and nobody could help them.

积聚.zh: 守财奴积聚钱财不是因为他谨慎，而是因为他贪婪。
积聚.en: A miser hoards money not because he is prudent but because he is greedy.

贪婪.zh: 守财奴积聚钱财不是因为他谨慎，而是因为他贪婪。
贪婪.en: A miser hoards money not because he is prudent but because he is greedy.

入境.zh: 请你把护照出示给我看看，还有入境表格填好了吗？
入境.en: Please let me see your passport, also did you complete the immigration form?

阴影.zh: 不存在没有阴影的光明，也不存在没有光明的阴影。
阴影.en: There's no light without shade, and no shade without light.

有阴影.zh: 不存在没有阴影的光明，也不存在没有光明的阴影。
有阴影.en: There's no light without shade, and no shade without light.

拾得.zh: 每個星期天，我都會把自己的房間收拾得整整齊齊。
拾得.en: I clean up my room every Sunday.

亥.zh: 我以为自己到了日本，但是当地人都说我在俄亥俄。
亥.en: I thought I traveled to Japan, but the locals kept telling me I was in Ohio.

俄亥俄.zh: 我以为自己到了日本，但是当地人都说我在俄亥俄。
俄亥俄.en: I thought I traveled to Japan, but the locals kept telling me I was in Ohio.

辗.zh: 我辗转反侧，反复思考着白天发生的事，后悔不已。
辗.en: I'm tossing and turning, repeatedly thinking about what happened today, deeply remorseful.

辗转.zh: 我辗转反侧，反复思考着白天发生的事，后悔不已。
辗转.en: I'm tossing and turning, repeatedly thinking about what happened today, deeply remorseful.

反侧.zh: 我辗转反侧，反复思考着白天发生的事，后悔不已。
反侧.en: I'm tossing and turning, repeatedly thinking about what happened today, deeply remorseful.

辗转反侧.zh: 我辗转反侧，反复思考着白天发生的事，后悔不已。
辗转反侧.en: I'm tossing and turning, repeatedly thinking about what happened today, deeply remorseful.

里头.zh: 他们匆匆忙忙去看足球赛，屋里头东西都丢在那儿。
里头.en: They hurried off to watch a football game, leaving their things all over the house.

腐朽.zh: 問題不是政治不純潔，而是整個政治博弈已經腐朽。
腐朽.en: The trouble is not with impure politics, but that the whole game of politics is rotten.

玲.zh: 佳玲說她阿嬤會用 LINE 了，還每天傳貼圖。
玲.en: Chia-ling said her grandma knows how to use LINE now. She sends stickers every day.

琥.zh: 充分氧化反應賦予紅茶濃鬱醇厚的風味和深琥珀色。
琥.en: Full oxidation gives black tea its deep, robust flavor and dark amber color.

醇厚.zh: 充分氧化反應賦予紅茶濃鬱醇厚的風味和深琥珀色。
醇厚.en: Full oxidation gives black tea its deep, robust flavor and dark amber color.

琥珀.zh: 充分氧化反應賦予紅茶濃鬱醇厚的風味和深琥珀色。
琥珀.en: Full oxidation gives black tea its deep, robust flavor and dark amber color.

手册.zh: 最好备一本家用医卫手册在枕头边，常常翻翻看看。
手册.en: It's best to keep a household medical manual by your pillow and read it from time to time.

翻看.zh: 最好备一本家用医卫手册在枕头边，常常翻翻看看。
翻看.en: It's best to keep a household medical manual by your pillow and read it from time to time.

降雪.zh: 人們擔心在強勁的冬季氣壓模式下，降雪量會增加。
降雪.en: There's a fear that the snow will strengthen amid the strong winter pressure pattern.

公会.zh: 市政府举行了一次大型公会，旨在促进跨部门合作。
公会.en: The city government held a large conference aimed at promoting cross-departmental cooperation.

陋.zh: 美丽、丑陋、富有、贫穷、强壮和虚弱都是形容词。
陋.en: Beautiful, ugly, rich, poor, strong, and weak are examples of adjectives.

丑陋.zh: 美丽、丑陋、富有、贫穷、强壮和虚弱都是形容词。
丑陋.en: Beautiful, ugly, rich, poor, strong, and weak are examples of adjectives.

况且.zh: 你这么漂亮，况且又这么聪明，怎么可能没人追你呢？
况且.en: You're beautiful and intelligent, how is it possible that no man is chasing after you?

复读.zh: 他反复读了好几遍她寄来的信，还是没明白她的意思。
复读.en: Over and over again, he read the letter she had mailed him, but he still did not understand it.

全副精力.zh: 你如果能把全副精力放進去，要學會英文並不是難事。
全副精力.en: If you concentrate all your energies on the study of English, you will master the language.

种种.zh: 由于种种原因，他们在法国的假期没让他们感到满意。
种种.en: For one reason or another their holiday in France didn't come up to expectations.

国土.zh: 根据国土安全部的规定，目前的安全水准是橙色等级。
国土.en: The security level, as established by the Department of Homeland Security, is orange.

国土安全.zh: 根据国土安全部的规定，目前的安全水准是橙色等级。
国土安全.en: The security level, as established by the Department of Homeland Security, is orange.

水准.zh: 根据国土安全部的规定，目前的安全水准是橙色等级。
水准.en: The security level, as established by the Department of Homeland Security, is orange.

多半.zh: 他到了火車站的時候，火車已經開出了差不多半小時。
多半.en: When he reached the station, the train had already left almost half an hour before.

假而.zh: 宁愿做自己而被人讨厌，也不要因为虚假而被人喜欢。
假而.en: Better to be hated for who you are than loved for who you're not.

米歇尔.zh: “迈克尔”是一个男名，但是“米歇尔”是一个女名。
米歇尔.en: "Michael" is a man's name, but "Michelle" is a woman's name.

下毒.zh: 一個差勁的廚師和下毒者唯一的不同在於他們的意圖。
下毒.en: The only difference between a bad cook and a poisoner is the intent.

呼气.zh: 如果呼气的时候能看到自己的气，你就知道天气很冷。
呼气.en: If you can see your breath when you exhale, you know it's cold.

次于.zh: 对于仅次于伦敦、发展第二快的城市，这是个好消息。
次于.en: For the UK's fastest growing city after London, this is good news.

仅次于.zh: 对于仅次于伦敦、发展第二快的城市，这是个好消息。
仅次于.en: For the UK's fastest growing city after London, this is good news.

春季.en: North China is cold in spring, so flowers don't bloom outdoors.

出租汽车.en: I didn't arrive in Harbin until very late, and the queue for taxis was already extremely long.

绕路.zh: 你觉得绕路的司机占所有的出租车司机的百分之多少？
绕路.en: What percentage of all taxi drivers make unscrupulous detours, do you think?

论定.zh: 看完研究以后，我们其中大部分人论定疫苗是件好事。
论定.en: After looking at the research, most of us conclude that vaccines are a good thing.

睬.zh: 凱特看了克里斯一眼，然後不理睬他，使他感到痛苦。
睬.en: Kate glanced at Chris and then ignored him, making him feel miserable.

理睬.zh: 凱特看了克里斯一眼，然後不理睬他，使他感到痛苦。
理睬.en: Kate glanced at Chris and then ignored him, making him feel miserable.

骰.zh: 他掷骰子之前让他的女友在上面吹气来给他带来好运。
骰.en: He had his girlfriend blow on the dice for luck before he threw them.

骰子.zh: 他掷骰子之前让他的女友在上面吹气来给他带来好运。

用钱.en: My dad gives me a weekly allowance that I use to buy comics and ice cream.

零用钱.zh: 我爸爸每周给我零用钱，我会用来买漫画书和冰激凌。

送死.zh: 你以為我會眼睜睜地看著你去送死？我會閉上眼睛的。
送死.en: Do you really think that I will simply watch you walk into trouble? I'd close my eyes.

蜚.zh: 人們不喜歡流言蜚語的唯一時間是當你閒聊他們的事。
蜚.en: The only time people dislike gossip is when you gossip about them.

蜚.zh: 人们唯一不喜欢流言蜚语的时间，就是当你讨论他们自己的时候。
蜚.en: The only time people dislike gossip is when you gossip about them.

流言.zh: 人們不喜歡流言蜚語的唯一時間是當你閒聊他們的事。
流言.en: The only time people dislike gossip is when you gossip about them.

流言.zh: 人们唯一不喜欢流言蜚语的时间，就是当你讨论他们自己的时候。
流言.en: The only time people dislike gossip is when you gossip about them.

好奇心.zh: 現代的北京给了我深刻的印象，也激起了我的好奇心。
好奇心.en: Today's Beijing has given me a very deep impression and aroused my curiosity.

经学.zh: 我上次计算，估计我已经学会了两千五百个汉字左右。
经学.en: Last time I counted, I estimated that I know around 2500 Chinese characters.

人孔.zh: 人孔是圓的，因為這樣人孔蓋就不會意外地掉進洞裡。
人孔.en: Manholes are round because that way they won't accidentally fall through the hole.

裁剪.zh: 二、在卡紙上畫一個回力鏢，然後把回力鏢裁剪出來。
裁剪.en: 2. Draw a boomerang shape on the card with a pen. Cut out the boomerang you've drawn.

上街.en: As I didn't have time to go shopping today, I had to make do with a sandwich for dinner.

枯燥.zh: 如果沒有了音樂，這個世界一定會變得十分枯燥乏味。
枯燥.en: If not for music, the world would be a dull place.

发货.en: We ordered the products on time. However, they won’t be dispatched until next month.

总结.en: His thesis summed up the new achievements made in computers, artificial satellites and rockets.

过渡.en: Her smooth entry into the ranks of the royal family will help to dispel these fears.

手洗.zh: 在厨房，家用洗碗机可以算得上是手洗刷碗工的大敌。
手洗.en: The washing-up machine at home was regarded as a rival to the worker at the kitchen sink.

洗刷.zh: 在厨房，家用洗碗机可以算得上是手洗刷碗工的大敌。
洗刷.en: The washing-up machine at home was regarded as a rival to the worker at the kitchen sink.

并列.en: Most students agree with the proposal and have made a list of arguments in favour of it.

不稳.zh: 由于一些写得糟糕的函数，系统大多数情况下不稳定。

安东尼.en: It was Sir Anthony's eightieth birthday concert and everybody wanted a ticket.

雷射.zh: 《WHAT THE CAR?》中的雷射奶牛又好笑又嚇人！
雷射.en: The laser cow in WHAT THE CAR? is both hilarious and terrifying!

病院.zh: 2025 年 1 月 20 日，精神病患接管了精神病院。
病院.en: On the 20th of January 2025, the inmates took over the asylum.

精神病患.zh: 2025 年 1 月 20 日，精神病患接管了精神病院。
精神病患.en: On the 20th of January 2025, the inmates took over the asylum.

精神病院.zh: 2025 年 1 月 20 日，精神病患接管了精神病院。
精神病院.en: On the 20th of January 2025, the inmates took over the asylum.

印尼.zh: 到 2025 年，印尼預計每天將產生 15 萬公噸垃圾。
印尼.en: By 2025, Indonesia is expected to generate 150 thousand tons of trash per day.

式微.zh: 那個男人大聲咆哮，但她訓練有素的客服式微笑始終沒有消退。
式微.en: The man ranted and raved, but her well practiced customer service smile remained unflinching.

消退.zh: 那個男人大聲咆哮，但她訓練有素的客服式微笑始終沒有消退。
消退.en: The man ranted and raved, but her well practiced customer service smile remained unflinching.

合乎.zh: 他的行為既不違法也不完全合乎道德，介於一種灰色地帶之間。
合乎.en: His actions are neither illegal nor entirely ethical, falling somewhere in a gray area.

中流.zh: 學生中流傳著一個傳言，說這位老師會讓所有學生考試不及格。
中流.en: Among the students there's a rumor that this teacher fails everyone on their exams.

蔑.zh: 你蔑視了目睹你罪行的仙女們，也蔑視了我を這位強大的潘神。
蔑.en: You scorned both the Nymphs, who beheld your deeds, and me the mighty Pan.

仙女.zh: 你蔑視了目睹你罪行的仙女們，也蔑視了我を這位強大的潘神。
仙女.en: You scorned both the Nymphs, who beheld your deeds, and me the mighty Pan.

潘.zh: 你蔑視了目睹你罪行的仙女們，也蔑視了我を這位強大的潘神。
潘.en: You scorned both the Nymphs, who beheld your deeds, and me the mighty Pan.

圈子.zh: 他的圈子裏有兩人是醫生，一個是外科醫生，另一個是眼科醫生。
圈子.en: There are two doctors in his circle of friends, a surgeon and an ophthalmologist.

阿拉木图.zh: 在许多突厥语族的语言中，“阿拉木图”有“苹果之父”的意思。
阿拉木图.en: "Almaty" means "The Father of Apples" in many Turkic languages.

童工.zh: 雖然已經踏入了新世紀，但是工廠僱用童工的情況還是沒有改善。
童工.en: At the turn of the century, children still worked in factories.

单子.zh: 请把发给你的那张单子看一下，再确认一下所有的句子都很通顺。
单子.en: Read the list we sent you and check that all the sentences sound natural to you.

通顺.zh: 请把发给你的那张单子看一下，再确认一下所有的句子都很通顺。
通顺.en: Read the list we sent you and check that all the sentences sound natural to you.

仲介.zh: 我們需要人力仲介公司幫我們找到合適的人來擔任這個管理職位。
仲介.en: We'll need a head hunting agency to find the right man for this executive position.

施洗.zh: 你如果看見聖靈降下，落在誰身上，誰就是用聖靈替人施洗的了。
施洗.en: The man on whom you see the Spirit come down and remain is he who will baptize with the Holy Spirit.

缇.zh: 鲍勃几乎把他所收集的所有邮票给了缇娜，只留了一点给他自己。
缇.en: Bob gave Tina almost all the stamps he had collected, and kept only a few for himself.

举重.zh: 我每隔一天就跟一个好朋友一起去，我们一起一边谈话一边举重。
举重.en: Every other day I go with a friend; we lift weights whilst chatting together.

种群.zh: 因为人类是一种群居动物，所以友情是生活里面一个必要的方面。
种群.en: As human beings are social animals, friendship is an essential part of life.

轻声.zh: 希望就是当整个世界都在说“不“的时候轻声地说“还有可能”。
轻声.en: Hope is a little voice whispering "maybe" when it seems the entire world is shouting "no"!

这般.zh: 没有任何娱乐像阅读这般廉价，也没有任何愉悦像阅读这般持久。
这般.en: No hobby is as cheap as reading, nor provides such long lasting enjoyment.

廉价.zh: 没有任何娱乐像阅读这般廉价，也没有任何愉悦像阅读这般持久。
廉价.en: No hobby is as cheap as reading, nor provides such long lasting enjoyment.

体内.zh: 这个团体内的每个人，像是一个健康的人体内免疫系统里的细胞。
体内.en: Every person in this community is like a cell in the immune system of a healthy human body.

免疫系统.zh: 这个团体内的每个人，像是一个健康的人体内免疫系统里的细胞。
免疫系统.en: Every person in this community is like a cell in the immune system of a healthy human body.

蜚语.zh: 人们唯一不喜欢流言蜚语的时间，就是当你讨论他们自己的时候。
蜚语.en: The only time people dislike gossip is when you gossip about them.

流言蜚语.zh: 人们唯一不喜欢流言蜚语的时间，就是当你讨论他们自己的时候。
流言蜚语.en: The only time people dislike gossip is when you gossip about them.

初设.zh: 由于最初设计中的一个缺陷，我们的网站易受到SQL注入攻击。
初设.en: Because of a flaw in the original design, our website is vulnerable to SQL injection attacks.

注入.zh: 由于最初设计中的一个缺陷，我们的网站易受到SQL注入攻击。
注入.en: Because of a flaw in the original design, our website is vulnerable to SQL injection attacks.

劳累.zh: 当亚历克斯·弗格森看到自己的球员劳累时，他总是叫替补上场。
劳累.en: When Sir Alex Ferguson saw that his players were getting tired, he always substituted them.

弗格森.zh: 当亚历克斯·弗格森看到自己的球员劳累时，他总是叫替补上场。
弗格森.en: When Sir Alex Ferguson saw that his players were getting tired, he always substituted them.

盎.zh: 盎格鲁-撒克逊人对诺曼人来说就像妻管严对溺爱妻子的人一样。
盎.en: Anglo-Saxon was to Norman as hen-pecked to uxorious.

盎格鲁.zh: 盎格鲁-撒克逊人对诺曼人来说就像妻管严对溺爱妻子的人一样。
盎格鲁.en: Anglo-Saxon was to Norman as hen-pecked to uxorious.

溺爱.zh: 盎格鲁-撒克逊人对诺曼人来说就像妻管严对溺爱妻子的人一样。
溺爱.en: Anglo-Saxon was to Norman as hen-pecked to uxorious.

诺曼人.zh: 盎格鲁-撒克逊人对诺曼人来说就像妻管严对溺爱妻子的人一样。
诺曼人.en: Anglo-Saxon was to Norman as hen-pecked to uxorious.

妻管严.zh: 盎格鲁-撒克逊人对诺曼人来说就像妻管严对溺爱妻子的人一样。
妻管严.en: Anglo-Saxon was to Norman as hen-pecked to uxorious.

撒克逊人.zh: 盎格鲁-撒克逊人对诺曼人来说就像妻管严对溺爱妻子的人一样。
撒克逊人.en: Anglo-Saxon was to Norman as hen-pecked to uxorious.

同归于尽.zh: 我们必须学会像兄弟一样共同生活，要么就像傻子一样同归于尽。
同归于尽.en: We must learn to live together as brothers, or we will perish together as fools.

在此之后.zh: 这大概是我最后一次环球旅行，在此之后，我就不再环游世界了。
在此之后.en: This is probably my very last world trip. After this one, I'm done.

暴动.zh: 革命就是一场暴动，一场由一个阶级推翻另一个阶级的暴力行动。
暴动.en: A revolution is an insurrection, an act of violence by which one class overthrows another.

阶级.zh: 革命就是一场暴动，一场由一个阶级推翻另一个阶级的暴力行动。
阶级.en: A revolution is an insurrection, an act of violence by which one class overthrows another.

力行.zh: 革命就是一场暴动，一场由一个阶级推翻另一个阶级的暴力行动。
力行.en: A revolution is an insurrection, an act of violence by which one class overthrows another.

助力.zh: 《WHAT THE CAR?》中的噴氣助力车讓我笑個不停！
助力.en: I can't stop laughing at the jetpack-powered car in "WHAT THE CAR?"!

助力车.zh: 《WHAT THE CAR?》中的噴氣助力车讓我笑個不停！
助力车.en: I can't stop laughing at the jetpack-powered car in "WHAT THE CAR?"!

犒.zh: 今天是我的休息日，我要買一整桶家庭裝的核桃冰淇淋犒勞自己。
犒.en: Since it's my day off today, I'm going to treat myself to a family-sized tub of walnut ice cream.

老人院.zh: 我在法国南边的一座小山买了一所房子，准备在那里建设老人院。
老人院.en: I bought a house on a small hill in southern France in preparation of building a retirement home.

投胎.zh: 如果可以投胎轉世的話，我想做有錢人家的兒子，一輩子衣食無憂。
投胎.en: If I could be reborn, I would want to be the child of a rich family, then I'd be set for life.

冯.zh: 冯迪索在做俯卧撑时，并不是把自身往上推，而是在把地球向下推。
冯.en: When Vin Diesel does pushups, he's not pushing himself up - he's pushing the Earth down.

俯卧.zh: 冯迪索在做俯卧撑时，并不是把自身往上推，而是在把地球向下推。
俯卧.en: When Vin Diesel does pushups, he's not pushing himself up - he's pushing the Earth down.

俯卧撑.zh: 冯迪索在做俯卧撑时，并不是把自身往上推，而是在把地球向下推。
俯卧撑.en: When Vin Diesel does pushups, he's not pushing himself up - he's pushing the Earth down.

向下.zh: 冯迪索在做俯卧撑时，并不是把自身往上推，而是在把地球向下推。
向下.en: When Vin Diesel does pushups, he's not pushing himself up - he's pushing the Earth down.

迎面.zh: 他沒有看見十字路口的停止標誌，和一輛迎面而來的汽車撞個正著。
迎面.en: He failed to see the stop sign at the intersection and hit an oncoming car.

用以.zh: 越来越多的环保者开始宣传和使用以环保的无铅汽油为燃料的汽车。
用以.en: More and more environmentalists advocate and use environmentally friendly unleaded petrol in cars.

精密.zh: 在這張專輯裡, 所有你聽到的聲音都是用電腦精密製作出的聲音。
精密.en: In this album all the sounds that you hear are really elaborate computer voices.

惧怕.zh: 惧怕爱就是惧怕生活，那些惧怕生活的人已经有四分之三部分死了。
惧怕.en: To fear love is to fear life, and those who fear life are already three parts dead.

怕生.zh: 惧怕爱就是惧怕生活，那些惧怕生活的人已经有四分之三部分死了。
怕生.en: To fear love is to fear life, and those who fear life are already three parts dead.

灰姑娘.zh: 像灰姑娘这样的故事可以在中国、日本及世界任何国家都可以找到。
灰姑娘.en: Stories like Cinderella can be found in China, Japan and in every land of the world.

分地.zh: 在迎接美好的明天前，每個富有的人一定會確保自己有充分地休息！
分地.en: Before welcoming a beautiful tomorrow, every rich man will ensure that he gets sufficient rest!

分号.zh: 尽管程序设计师天天都会用到分号，大多数人只把分号用在表情中。
分号.en: Where programmers use semi-colons every day, the majority of people only use them in emoticons.

设计师.zh: 尽管程序设计师天天都会用到分号，大多数人只把分号用在表情中。
设计师.en: Where programmers use semi-colons every day, the majority of people only use them in emoticons.

程序设计.zh: 尽管程序设计师天天都会用到分号，大多数人只把分号用在表情中。
程序设计.en: Where programmers use semi-colons every day, the majority of people only use them in emoticons.

字符.zh: 如果你想使用中文字符，你应该以UTF-8编码来保存你的文件。
字符.en: If you want to use Chinese characters, be sure you've saved your files in the UTF-8 encoding.

编码.zh: 如果你想使用中文字符，你应该以UTF-8编码来保存你的文件。
编码.en: If you want to use Chinese characters, be sure you've saved your files in the UTF-8 encoding.

零嘴.zh: 我們整天吃的都是雜七雜八的零嘴，並沒有甚麼正規的食物下過肚。
零嘴.en: Instead of eating real food, we just ate junk food all day.

小米.zh: 我似乎不太喜欢小米，我觉得小米是屌丝用的手机，就是个山寨机。
小米.en: I don't really like Xiaomi phones, and I think that they're for losers. They're like knock-offs.

屌丝.zh: 我似乎不太喜欢小米，我觉得小米是屌丝用的手机，就是个山寨机。
屌丝.en: I don't really like Xiaomi phones, and I think that they're for losers. They're like knock-offs.

寨.zh: 我似乎不太喜欢小米，我觉得小米是屌丝用的手机，就是个山寨机。
寨.en: I don't really like Xiaomi phones, and I think that they're for losers. They're like knock-offs.

山寨.zh: 我似乎不太喜欢小米，我觉得小米是屌丝用的手机，就是个山寨机。
山寨.en: I don't really like Xiaomi phones, and I think that they're for losers. They're like knock-offs.

山寨机.zh: 我似乎不太喜欢小米，我觉得小米是屌丝用的手机，就是个山寨机。
山寨机.en: I don't really like Xiaomi phones, and I think that they're for losers. They're like knock-offs.

天寒地冻.zh: 即使明天天寒地冻，路远马亡，我也要有对简单生活和梦想的追求。
天寒地冻.en: It was for a dead person rather than a living one that we were searching.

疗养.zh: 是我发现她的。她当时已经失去了意识，所以我把她送到了疗养院。
疗养.en: It was I who found her. She'd lost consciousness, so I carried her to the infirmary.

疗养院.zh: 是我发现她的。她当时已经失去了意识，所以我把她送到了疗养院。
疗养院.en: It was I who found her. She'd lost consciousness, so I carried her to the infirmary.

聘用.zh: 我知道汤姆会成为一位优秀的篮球教练。这就是为什么我聘用了他。
聘用.en: I knew Tom would be a good basketball coach. That's why I hired him.

把控.zh: 没有男人有能把控住女性理性的想象力，这就是为什么它被说无理。
把控.en: No man has the imagination required to grasp female reason, which is why it is called unreasonable.

影像.zh: 放射學中採用了數種影像技術，比如 X 光、MRI 和超音波。
影像.en: A number of imaging techniques are employed in radiology, such as X-ray, MRI, and ultrasound.

松科.zh: 松科樹木的木材因其優良的品質，在建築和家具製造領域備受推崇。
松科.en: The wood of trees in the pine family is much prized for construction and furniture making.

推崇.zh: 松科樹木的木材因其優良的品質，在建築和家具製造領域備受推崇。
推崇.en: The wood of trees in the pine family is much prized for construction and furniture making.
